xf:var.name: control-events-legacy
xf:var.value: for $e in $events-20182 return if ($e = 'value-changed') then 'xforms-value-changed' else if ($e = 'enabled') then 'xforms-enabled' else if ($e = 'disabled') then 'xforms-disabled' else if ($e = 'activated') then 'DOMActivate' else if ($e = 'visible') then 'xxforms-visible' else if ($e = 'hidden') then 'xxforms-hidden' else if ($e = 'item-selected') then 'xforms-select' else if ($e = 'item-deselected') then 'xforms-deselect' else ()

xf:setvalue.value: if ($has-control-observer) then if (exists($control-events-legacy)) then string-join($control-events-legacy, ' ') else 'xforms-value-changed' else if ($events-20182 = 'form-load-before-data') then 'fr-run-form-load-action-before-data' else if ($events-20182 = 'form-load-after-data') then 'fr-run-form-load-action-after-data' else 'fr-run-form-load-action-after-controls'
if (exists($if-elem)) then string($if-elem/@condition) else if ($instance/fb:listener/xxf:split(@modes) = 'new') then '$fr-mode=''new''' else 'true()'

xf:var.name: param-name-from-path

xf:select1.ref: (: Bind to transient element, so the dropdown is never invalid :) xf:element('_', string($condition-value))

xf:value.ref: if (@id = 'always') then 'true()' else if (@id = 'new-only') then '$fr-mode=''new''' else if ($is-predefined-condition) then '' else $condition-value
if (@id = 0) then if ($observer = 'fr-form-model') then '' else string($observer) else if (@id = 1) then 'fr-form-model' else error()

xf:var.name: template

fr:dnd-repeat.ref: let $items := fr:value | fr:url-param | fr:header return if (exists($items)) then $items else $template

xf:var.name: source-type
xf:var.value: if ($has-control-attr) then 'control-name' else if ($has-value-attr) then 'source-path' else 'control-name'

fr:dnd-repeat.ref: let $items := fr:sql-param return if (exists($items)) then $items else $template

xf:var.name: source-type
xf:var.value: if ($has-control-attr) then 'control-name' else if ($has-value-attr) then 'source-path' else 'control-name'

fr:dnd-repeat.ref: let $items := fr:control-setvalue | fr:control-setitems | fr:dataset-write return if (exists($items)) then $items else instance('fb-binding-action-template')/*[ if ($event-not-before-controls-ready) then self::fr:control-setvalue else self::fr:dataset-write ][1]

xf:select1.ref: if ($can-remove-action) then xf:element('_', local-name()) else instance('fb-binding-action-readonly-response-action-types')/value[. = local-name()]

xf:var.name: mapped-control-events
xf:var.value: for $e in $event-tokens return if ($e = 'xforms-value-changed') then 'value-changed' else if ($e = 'xforms-enabled') then 'enabled' else if ($e = 'xforms-disabled') then 'disabled' else if ($e = 'DOMActivate') then 'activated' else if ($e = 'xxforms-visible') then 'visible' else if ($e = 'xxforms-hidden') then 'hidden' else if ($e = 'xforms-select') then 'item-selected' else if ($e = 'xforms-deselect') then 'item-deselected' else ()

xf:setvalue.value: if ($observer != 'fr-form-model') then if (exists($mapped-control-events)) then string-join($mapped-control-events, ' ') else 'value-changed' else if ($event-tokens = 'fr-run-form-load-action-before-data') then 'form-load-before-data' else if ($event-tokens = 'fr-run-form-load-action-after-data') then 'form-load-after-data' else 'form-load-after-controls'

xf:var.name: bare-controls

xf:instance.xxf:exclude-result-prefixes: xh exf xsi xi xxi fr fb saxon xbl exforms
xh exf xsi xi xxi fr fb saxon xbl exforms
